    <item>
      <title>Steve Kerr may already have a new job as Warriors future is in doubt</title>
      <description>The Golden State Warriors fell short of a trip to the playoffs, and for the first time in a decade, it looks like this might actually be the end of the dynasty. </description>
      <pubDate>04 May 2026 09:40:46 -0400</pubDate>

      <title>Five questions Trail Blazers face after returning to playoffs</title>
      <description>A season that started with the chaos of head coach Chauncey Billups' arrest ended with the Portland Trail Blazers' first trip to the playoffs in five seasons. </description>

    <item>
      <title>Three things Lakers need to do vs. Thunder</title>
      <description>OKC has been the best offensive team thus far in the playoffs, and for LeBron James and his crew to stand a chance, they'll have to find multiple ways to slow down this well-oiled machine. Here's how they can manage this.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Jalen Brunson makes unique history in Knicks' Game 1 win over 76ers</title>
      <description>Jalen Brunson and the New York Knicks were absolutely pumping iron on Monday to begin their series against the Philadelphia 76ers. It was a blowout win for the Knicks, with the team towering over the 76ers, 137-98.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Jarrett Allen's Game 7 performance matches LeBron James in Cavaliers' history</title>
      <description>One key role player made history as the Cleveland Cavaliers punched their ticket to the second round with a 114-102 win over the Toronto Raptors on Sunday night.  While it took a total team effort for the Cavaliers to clinch their first-round series in seven games, Jarrett Allen stepped up more than anyone else. </description>
      <pubDate>03 May 2026 23:05:40 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/jarrett_allens_game_7_performance_matches_lebron_james_in_cavaliers_history/s1_13132_43802743</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/jarrett_allens_game_7_performance_matches_lebron_james_in_cavaliers_history/s1_13132_43802743</guid>

      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/7/2/720aa28330a300a1f72146db5a789c118697a60e/thumb_16x9/jarrett-allens-game-7-performance-matches-lebron.jpg">
        <media:credit> Nick Turchiaro-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Cleveland Cavaliers center Jarrett Allen. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Cleveland Cavaliers</category>

      <category>Los Angeles Lakers</category>
      <category>Jarrett Allen</category>
      <category>Donovan Mitchell</category>

      <category>LeBron James</category>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Jalen Brunson, Knicks make history with third-straight blowout win</title>
      <description>With their series-opening win over the Philadelphia 76ers, the New York Knicks sent a message and continued to look unbeatable. The Knicks grabbed a 1-0 lead in their second-round series, dominating the 76ers to the tune of 137-98. </description>

      <title>Victor Wembanyama's offensive woes spoil historic defensive effort in Game 1 loss to Timberwolves</title>

    <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham's monster performance leads Pistons to second round</title>
